title: Qinglele 2pcs Kitchen Bathroom Sink Strainer, Stainless Steel Drain Filter, Thicker, Outer Diameter 3 Inch/77mm (Small Size)
features: Micro-perforation: 2mm dia holes. Allows water to pass through while capturing bits of food and waste，Unique beveled edge provides a secure fit.
Scope of application: for drainage port of the sink with diameter greater than 43mm (1.7inch) and less than 77mm (3inch).
Meticulous processing, no burrs will not hurt hands.
Large Kitchen sink strainers made of heavy duty & durable stainless steel.
Easy wash with warm soapy water to keep the mirror finish shine impeccable over time. Dishwasher safe.
description: Product Description Hemming design, no sharp edges. Dense and uniform leak holes, Fast drainage and strong filtration. The sewer is not blocked and the living environment is cleaner.
